highlights.text: Discovery — browse sports, competitions, events, venues, and navigation tree
Live pricing — market books, runner books, real-time volumes
Trading — place, cancel, update, and replace orders (write-gated)
Certificate auth — non-interactive bot login, no browser needed
Weight-aware rate limiting — per-endpoint cost tracking
Double-gated writes — BETFAIR_WRITE_ENABLED + confirm: true for real money

readme:
### What it does

Betfair Exchange gives your AI agent full access to the world’s largest betting exchange. Browse sports and competitions, fetch live market prices, manage your account, and — when explicitly enabled — place and manage real-money orders.

22 tools cover the complete lifecycle: from discovering events across 30+ sports, through real-time market data and order book analysis, to execution and settlement tracking.

### Tool groups

| Group | Tools | Coverage |
|-------|-------|---------|
| Discovery | 8 | Sports, competitions, events, venues, market catalogue, navigation |
| Pricing | 3 | Market books (all runners), runner books (single), live volumes |
| Account | 4 | Funds, details, transaction history, currency rates |
| Orders | 3 | Current (active), cleared (settled), market P&L per selection |
| Trading | 4 | Place, cancel, update persistence, atomic replace |
| System | 2 | Login status, keepalive (session refresh) |

### Safety model

Trading with real money demands defence in depth:

- **Read-only by default** — all 17 read tools work immediately
- **Environment gate** — `BETFAIR_WRITE_ENABLED=true` unlocks the 5 write tools
- **Confirm gate** — `place_orders` and `replace_orders` additionally require `confirm: true`
- **Heartbeat** — dead-man switch auto-cancels unmatched LIMIT bets if your agent disconnects

### Authentication

Uses Betfair’s certificate-based non-interactive login — no browser, no CAPTCHA, no session cookies. Generate a self-signed certificate, link it to your Betfair account, and the server handles login and session refresh automatically.

### Rate limiting

Betfair assigns different API weights to different endpoints (a `market_book` call costs more than `event_types`). The rate limiter tracks per-endpoint weight consumption and throttles automatically, so your agent stays within Betfair’s limits without manual pacing.

scenarios.label: Pre-race market analysis
scenarios.body: List today’s horse racing events, fetch market catalogues for a specific venue, get live runner prices, and check current account exposure before making a decision.

scenarios.label: Monitor and manage open positions
scenarios.body: Check current orders across all markets, review P&L per selection, decide whether to cancel unmatched bets or let them stand in-play, and verify account funds.

scenarios.label: End-of-day settlement review
scenarios.body: Pull cleared orders for today, review account statement for settlements and commission, check currency rates, and summarise the day’s trading performance.

setup.blurb: Full Betfair Exchange access — markets, prices, orders, account. Certificate auth with weight-aware rate limiting. 22 tools, full betting-exchange-v1 contract.
setup.help_text: Register a Betfair API application at developer.betfair.com. Generate a self-signed certificate and link it to your account. Certificate auth avoids interactive login.

fields.label: Certificate Path
fields.help: Self-signed client certificate linked to your Betfair account

fields.label: Private Key Path
fields.help: Private key corresponding to the client certificate

fields.label: Exchange
fields.help: uk (default) or au for Australian exchange

fields.label: Enable Trading
fields.help: Place, cancel, update, and replace orders. Real money operations.

prerequisites: Betfair account with API access enabled
Self-signed client certificate linked to account

certification.security_notes: Certificate auth (no interactive login). Write gates on all order operations. Confirm gates on place_orders. Weight-aware rate limiting (per-endpoint). Real money at stake when write-enabled.
